_comment: Routing registry of the orchestrator's specialist agents (intent + path + threshold). The SOURCE OF TRUTH for each agent is its folder agents/<name>/ (agent.yaml + instructions.md + tools.yaml); scripts/compile-agent.sh derives workflows/n8n/<name>-agent.json from it, and each agent.yaml's routing keys mirror its row here. The /build-agent skill keeps this row in sync with the folder, agent-router.json, configure-agent-router.yml, and AGENTS.md; check-agent-folder.sh gates folder↔JSON. The orchestrator (the Agent Router) only dispatches to intents listed here. See agents/_spec/agent-folder.spec.md + templates/n8n/subagent.contract.md.

orchestrator.name: Agent Router
orchestrator.invariant: Only the orchestrator's voice (Send Reply in tg-inbound.json) messages the operator; every agent below returns {reply} to the orchestrator and never addresses the operator directly.
orchestrator.routing: Single-pick by default: the classifier emits one primary intent and 'Route by Intent' dispatches to exactly one agent below. ADDITIVE conditional fan-out for multi-domain requests: the classifier also emits intents[] + multi; when multi=true (>=2 distinct fan-out domains from ops|code|research|infra) a 'Multi Gate' diverts to 'Build Fan-out Items' -> 'Run Specialists' (one executeWorkflow node, mode:each, per-item workflowId reusing the same @@SUB_*_WF_ID@@ ids) which runs the relevant agents, then 'Collect Replies' + 'Synthesize' merge their {reply}s into ONE reply before the shared Egress Validation. Graceful: a parse failure or <2 distinct domains falls back to single-pick. Never changes the single-pick path, the agents, or the voice; 'unknown' never participates in fan-out.

agents.description: Operations, monitoring, status, deployments, CI, commits, PRs, execution history; carries read-only system tools + approved write requests.
Writing, editing, reviewing code (minimal LLM, no tools).
Open-ended questions, information lookup, web search.
Advisory-only infrastructure guidance — DNS, secrets, cloud resources, deployments, networking (no tools, no changes).
General conversation + system awareness; the default fallback for unclassified messages. Carries the full read-only system toolset and approved write requests.

background_workers.name: deep-research
background_workers.trigger: explicit phrase (e.g. 'תחקור לעומק' / 'deep research') detected in the router's 'Detect Deep Research' node — NOT a classifier intent
background_workers.invocation: router 'Kick Deep Research' (executeWorkflow, waitForSubWorkflow=false) — fire-and-forget; the router returns an instant ack on the synchronous line
background_workers.delivery: self-sends the finished report to Telegram (its own Send Report node) — by design exempt from the sub-agent contract's telegram-forbidden rule, since it addresses the operator directly after running for minutes in the background
background_workers.description: Long-running (minutes) multi-search web deep-research on claude-sonnet-4.5 + Tavily; produces a structured report with a [[SOURCES]] block, egress-validated + Telegram-chunked. Stripped from the router when its requirements are absent.
